//: Dedicated tsconfig for the tsup bundle. It INHERITS the workspace `paths` map from tsconfig.base.json (which points every @ancientpantheon/codex-* member + subpath at its SRC index) so both the esbuild JS pass AND the rollup-plugin-dts type pass treat the four private members as internal source and INLINE them — JS into dist chunks, types into codex's own .d.ts. Resolving through src (not the members' exports→dist) is what lets the dts step follow subpath re-exports it otherwise leaves external. `jsx: react-jsx` is required because bundling from src compiles the members' TSX. Do NOT redefine `baseUrl` here — the inherited `paths` must stay resolved relative to the repo-root baseUrl declared in the base config.
